reviews.comment:
Los empleados atienden excelente. Tienen que poner más personal porque en esta época no dan a vasto . Repito el personal de minimarket es espectacular pero falta gente que atienda .

(Translated by Google)
The employees provide excellent service. They need to add more staff because they're short on resources these days. I repeat, the convenience store staff is spectacular, but they're short on people to serve.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbnEzQUxREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Baños impecables. Parque, mesas, parrillas. Bonito lugar. Muy buena para hacer escala, cargar combustible y descansar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Spotless restrooms. Park, tables, grills. Nice place. Great for a stopover, refueling, and relaxing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcnVhOHNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Punto de descanso habitual cuando viajo a Mendoza. Excelente atención tanto en expendio de combustibles como en store de bebidas y comestibles.

(Translated by Google)
A regular rest stop when I travel to Mendoza. Excellent service both at the gas station and the convenience store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMW9MaHZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de los playeros y del buffet,muy buenas instalaciones sanitarias y muy limpias

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach staff and the buffet; very good and very clean sanitary facilities.
